feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: Europe is officially third-world.

entry.title: /b/ Random: I had sex with my cousin a few years ago on a family vacation for a wedding, I w…
entry.content: I had sex with my cousin a few years ago on a family vacation for a wedding, I would describe it as the most awkward and hottest experience of my life. I was 33 and she was 24, she's cute and I'd perv over her a bit but until it happened I would have never believed it. She went swimming in her underwear and I got aroused, the whole family was there so I was trying not to stare but when she got out of the water in her underwear dripping wet with her nipples almost visible I couldn't keep my eyes

entry.title: /b/ Random: I am super outspoken about feminism, but in reality, I love misogyny. It turns me on.
entry.content: I can't admit to anyone that misogynistic men turn me on.. so I've decided to tell 4Chan! I'm a female, duh, and I'm always preaching about women's rights and stuff.. but I goon to stories/posts about misogyny, rape, etc.. so embarrassing for me!! ..also, my brother walked into my room while I was typing this. Close one!

entry.title: /g/ Technology: with AI, they're doing what they did to the internet Not many people know this, …
entry.content: with AI, they're doing what they did to the internet Not many people know this, but we could have had the internet since the 1970s. The government wouldn't allow the public to have it. It was only allowed to be used for military purposes, then government and corporate, and university. Decades of technological progress flushed down the drain so the government could hoard the internet for itself. Imagine if we had the dotcom bubble in the 1980s instead of late 90s. It was completely possible. They

entry.title: /o/ Auto: What can we do to reduce deaths by cars? Speed limiters? Why not? do you intend …
entry.content: What can we do to reduce deaths by cars? Speed limiters? Why not? do you intend to speed? well you shouldn't have a licence! The highest speed limit in America is a single 85mph road, so why not limit cars to a top speed of 90mph? surely you aren't criminals, racing on the road, and should have your licence revoked? Smaller vehicles? the mega truck craze massively increases deaths by cars, 90% of truck owners would not be negatively effected by swapping to a minivan, sedan, or hatchback Easier l

entry.title: /g/ Technology: SHED - init agnostic user services session process

entry.content: New Democrat Hero, John Bolton, pleads guilty to illegally retaining classified information https://apnews.com/article/bolton-j ustice-department-trump-classified- information-e95c29e7f8659d8b4b01d44 148ae1ab4 GREENBELT, Md. (AP) — Former Trump administration national security adviser John Bolton pleaded guilty on Friday to illegally retaining classified information, sealing a deal with federal prosecutors that could allow him to avoid a prison term. Bolton, who became an outspoken critic of Pre

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why can't we have nice things?
entry.content: Global shortcuts on Wayland apparently require using fucking D-Bus and the xdg-desktop-portal disaster. How did anyone think that was a good idea? It's so bad that 3 years later, adoption is basically none. Sure, wayland protocols suck, but this is so much worse in every possible way. It's no wonder that the native GUI situation on Linux is a disaster. The simple and effective APIs are "deprecated" and replaced with utter shit like this every 5 years, because keeping existing programs working is

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Remember when this game might have actually been taken seriously as the Legend o…
entry.content: Remember when this game might have actually been taken seriously as the Legend of Delta Rune? With all these spontaneous fountains to justify the runtime and the rampant homosexuality, I don't think this is the Legend of Delta Rune at all and that hack Toby Fox lied. What kind of a quest do you have when the story just happens to you instead of you seeking it out? It's ridiculous and there should have been a world map to take you to different dark worlds to beat them one by one until you get to

entry.title: /int/ International: Did you know that Korean-Japanese marriage is a new growing trend?
entry.content: https://www.korea.net/NewsFocus/Soc iety/view?articleId=289254 >Matrimony between Korean men and Japanese women saw a conspicuous hike of 26.1% from 1,176 in 2024 to 1,483 last year. Unions between Japanese men and Korean women rose 29.3% to 190, up from 147 in 2024. Marriage between Korean male and Japanese female jumped by 26.1% in just a year. Truly, we're witnessing another age of Asian solidarity.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Wild animal fights
entry.content: Why has nobody made a show where captured wild animals fight to the death? It would be cool seeing a gorilla fight a lion or a pack of hyenas vs a pack of chimps.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: MCR is obviously the most iconic emo band of all time but they're really more of…
entry.content: MCR is obviously the most iconic emo band of all time but they're really more of a solid rock band than anything else. All of their albums are vastly different from each other and they never had any interest in repeating themselves. Can we finally agree they're just "rock"?

I feel genuinely stupid now... I'll recover but I struggle with these things... I wanna go home and hide and sleep... later full meeting with manager where I need to explain myself... Good news though... I found people to go climbing with... so slowly not being anxious... but now I wanna hide like a snail... Sorry for long message.... Your f

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: If you are white, you are European, if you are indigenous, you are American, if …
entry.content: If you are white, you are European, if you are indigenous, you are American, if you are a nigger, you are African or an Abbo. I'm not a Shitzlian because I'm Iberian, You may be proud of being born in U.S., Canada, Australia, New Zealand, even though you're not native to them, but I'm not proud of being born in a shithole land, I'm not even part of its culture. I really hate NIGGERS AND BROWNS FOR DESTROYING OUR WORLD. I JUST WISH THAT THEY WERE EXTERMINATED BEFORE SLAVERY.
